title: justicia maya
intro: Justicia maya, also known as mayan sage or mayan tea, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central America, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which possess potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Justicia maya have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Justicia maya are often consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures, and can be used to address issues such as fever, fatigue, and respiratory problems.
